title: KNK Labs
summary: KNK Labs is a human-interface technology company building intelligent wearable systems and smart apparel. The company develops sensor-equipped clothing and wearable hardware that bridges physical apparel and digital technology.
shortDescription: A digital experience for a wearable technology company building intelligent smart apparel and human-interface systems.
